svg.aria-label: C Kernel Engine — Data × Computation Spectrum
svg.text: C Kernel Engine — Data × Computation Spectrum
Both spectra are co-equal. Any stage is re-entrant. No step is once-and-done — the engine is the traversal space.
◎ IR Visualizer (ir_report.html) — Train IR, Infer IR, Data Lab, Parity — full observability at every stage
IR Build forks: Train (IR1 fwd + IR2 bwd, fp32) and Infer (decode gemv + prefill gemm, quantized, KV cache) are separate pipelines — both converge at Codegen.
